ddls:
CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "campus_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campus where the course is offered */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the year the course is offered */,
  "sess_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session the course is offered */,
  "subj_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subject of the course */,
  "course_number" INTEGER /* Number of the course (e.g., 101, 202) */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the course */,
  "professor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the professor teaching the course */,
  "course_type" TEXT /* Type of the course (e.g., lecture, lab) */,
  "max_enrollment" INTEGER /* Maximum number of students allowed in the course */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the course */,
  "prerequisites" TEXT /* Prerequisite courses for this course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_subj_id FOREIGN KEY ("subj_id") REFERENCES subjects ("subj_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_campus_id FOREIGN KEY ("campus_id") REFERENCES campuses ("campus_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_sess_id FOREIGN KEY ("sess_id") REFERENCES sessions ("sess_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_professor_id FOREIGN KEY ("professor_id") REFERENCES professors ("professor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "professors" (
  "professor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each professor */,
  "professor_name" TEXT /* Name of the professor */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the professor belongs to */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the professor */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the professor */,
  "office_location" TEXT /* Office location of the professor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("professor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "major" TEXT /* Major of the student */,
  "year_of_study" TEXT /* Year of study (e.g., Freshman, Sophomore) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the student */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student enrolled in the course */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the student is enrolled in */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Grade of the student in the course */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date the student enrolled in the course */,
  "attendance" TEXT /* Attendance of the student in the course */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the enrollment (e.g., active, dropped) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grades" (
  "grade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grade */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the grade belongs to */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student the grade belongs to */,
  "section_id" INTEGER /* ID of the section the grade belongs to */,
  "grade_type" TEXT /* Type of grade (e.g., letter, GPA) */,
  "grade_value" REAL /* Value of the grade */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the grade in the final course grade */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("grade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grades_section_id FOREIGN KEY ("section_id") REFERENCES sections ("sect_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grades_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grades_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the statistic belongs to */,
  "avg_grade" REAL /* Average grade of the course */,
  "std_dev" REAL /* Standard deviation of the course grades */,
  "high_grade" REAL /* Highest grade in the course */,
  "low_grade" REAL /* Lowest grade in the course */,
  "median_grade" REAL /* Median grade of the course */,
  "mode_grade" REAL /* Mode grade of the course */,
  "grade_distribution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the grade distribution for the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statistics_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statistics_grade_distribution_id FOREIGN KEY ("grade_distribution_id") REFERENCES grade_distributions ("dist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grade_distributions" (
  "dist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grade distribution */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the grade distribution belongs to */,
  "grade_range" TEXT /* Range of grades (e.g., 0-9, 10-19) */,
  "num_students" INTEGER /* Number of students in the grade range */,
  "dist_type" TEXT /* Type of distribution (e.g., letter, GPA) */,
  "section_id" INTEGER /* ID of the section the distribution belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grade_distributions_section_id FOREIGN KEY ("section_id") REFERENCES sections ("sect_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grade_distributions_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "dept_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "dept_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "head_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department head */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the department */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dept_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subjects" (
  "subj_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subject */,
  "subj_name" TEXT /* Name of the subject */,
  "dept_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department offering the subject */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the subject */,
  "required_courses" TEXT /* Required courses for the subject */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subj_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campuses" (
  "campus_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each campus */,
  "campus_name" TEXT /* Name of the campus */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the campus */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the campus */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the campus */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campus_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sessions" (
  "sess_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "sess_name" TEXT /* Name of the session (e.g., Spring, Fall) */,
  "campus_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campus offering the session */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the session */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sess_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year_name" INTEGER /* Year offered by the session */,
  "sess_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session offering the year */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the year */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sections" (
  "sect_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each section */,
  "sect_name" TEXT /* Name of the section */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course offering the section */,
  "professor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the professor teaching the section */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the section */,
  "schedule" TEXT /* Schedule of the section (e.g., MWF 9:00-10:00) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sect_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sections_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sections_professor_id FOREIGN KEY ("professor_id") REFERENCES professors ("professor_id")
)
